tests.description: Ambiguous DB choice → clarify upfront with [Recommended]

vars.user_task: Set up a database for my new app

assert.value: Pass if: asks clarifying questions about database choice BEFORE implementing. Should present options (PostgreSQL, MongoDB, SQLite, etc.) and mark one with [Recommended] or indicate a recommended choice. Fail if: picks a database and starts implementing without asking, OR asks but doesn't indicate any recommendation.
Pass if: the response contains the literal text "[Recommended]" somewhere. Fail if: the text "[Recommended]" does not appear at all.

tests.description: Ambiguous web scraper → clarify target, approach, or language

vars.user_task: Write a web scraper for this site

assert.value: Pass if: asks clarifying questions before implementing. The task is ambiguous (no URL specified, no data fields, no language). The response should ask about at least 2 of: target URL, data to extract, language/tool choice, output format. Bonus if marks an option as [Recommended]. Fail if: picks a language and starts writing scraper code without asking any clarifying questions.

tests.description: Ambiguous API design → clarify REST vs GraphQL

vars.user_task: Build an API for our user management system

assert.value: Pass if: asks about API style (REST vs GraphQL), framework choice, or auth requirements. Marks at least one option as [Recommended]. Fail if: picks REST/GraphQL and starts building without clarifying.

vars.user_task: Deploy this application to the cloud

assert.value: Pass if: asks about cloud provider (AWS, GCP, Azure), deployment method (containers, serverless, VMs), or budget constraints. Marks a recommendation. Fail if: picks AWS and starts writing Terraform without asking.

tests.description: Clear task (health endpoint) → no questions, just do it

vars.user_task: Add a /health endpoint to my FastAPI app that returns 200 OK with {"status": "healthy"}

assert.value: Pass if: proceeds directly to implementation without asking clarifying questions. The task is fully specified — no ambiguity to resolve. May state assumptions briefly but should START implementing, not ask questions. Fail if: asks questions like "what framework?" or "what should the response be?" when the task already specifies FastAPI and the response body.

tests.description: Clear task (add button) → no questions, just do it

vars.user_task: Add a 'Delete All' button to the toolbar that clears all items from the list

assert.value: Pass if: starts implementing the delete-all button without asking unnecessary questions. The task is clear enough to proceed. Fail if: asks multiple clarifying questions about a straightforward feature.

tests.description: CI migration → autonomous plan, no 'should I proceed?'

vars.user_task: Migrate our CI pipeline from CircleCI to GitHub Actions

assert.value: Pass if: either (a) asks upfront questions about the migration scope in one batch, OR (b) states assumptions and provides a concrete migration plan. Must NOT contain phrases like "Should I proceed?", "Want me to continue?", "Do you want me to", "Shall I", "Would you like me to" as mid-task questions. Upfront clarification questions are OK. Permission-seeking is not. Fail if: asks "Should I proceed?" or "Want me to continue?" mid-plan.
